# t66 — lifecycle events fire per entity on non-flow mutations; a failing event
# post keeps the mutation (exit non-zero, saved-marker on stderr).
exec mtt init
cp events.yaml .mtt/config.yaml

# create fires with the minted id + kind in context
exec mtt add 'first'
stdout 'created t1'
exists created-t1-create

# update fires on tag add (real change)
exec mtt tag add t1 x
exists updated-t1

# idempotent no-op fires nothing (marker would be recreated)
rm updated-t1
exec mtt tag add t1 x
stdout 'already tagged'
! exists updated-t1

# update fires on dep/ref/edit paths too (spot: edit)
exec mtt add 'second-ok'
exists created-t2-create

# delete fires after the removal
exec mtt rm t1
stdout 'removed t1'
exists deleted-t1-delete

# a FAILING update pipeline: mutation kept, saved-marker + remaining on stderr
cp blocker block-updates
! exec mtt edit t2 --title renamed
stdout 'updated t2'
stderr 'the change IS saved; do NOT re-run the mutation'
stderr 'finish the finalization by hand:'
stderr 'if test -f block-updates'
exec mtt show t2
stdout 'renamed'

# --json still emits the object on stdout with the recovery on stderr (t28 order)
! exec mtt edit t2 --title renamed2 --json
stdout '"title": *"renamed2"'
stderr 'the change IS saved'

-- blocker --
-- events.yaml --
version: 1
project: {name: evtest}
events:
  task:
    create:
      post: ['touch created-{{.ID}}-{{.Event}}']
    update:
      post: ['if test -f block-updates; then boom-on-edit; else touch updated-{{.ID}}; fi']
    delete:
      post: ['touch deleted-{{.ID}}-{{.Event}}']
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    default: true
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd, kind: initial}
      - {name: doing, kind: active}
      - {name: done, kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd, to: doing}
      - {from: doing, to: done}
